title: PREGNANCY SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based organization that provides information and referrals to those experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pregnancy testing, pro-life counseling, early obstetrical ultrasounds, STI testing, parenting & life skills education and support groups through baby's first birthday. Offers parenting groups and classes for parents to participate in and be able to receive baby items, Earn While You Earn and New Mom's Club. Does not recommend or refer to abortion services. 2019 Aero Way #103 Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Families who think they may be pregnant, and families who are either pregnant or parenting a newborn. Hours: Monday/Thursday 10am-4pm, Tuesday/Wednesday 10am-7pm Email (541) 772-1921 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-1921 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: New patients and clients have an initial 1 to 1.5 hour visit. Walk-ins are welcome, but appointments are highly recommended. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: State ID card or drivers license AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Off Highway 62, behind Lowes and North Walmart. The nearest cross street is Lear Way. Shares a building with Rory Wold State Farm Insurance. RVTD Route 60 White City. Services: Baby Clothing Diapers Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Chlamydia Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening * Gonorrhea If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PREGNANCY CENTER
